class.name: JustAMCPPromptExecutor
class.brief_description: Lists, resolves, and completes prompts for MCP clients.

method.name: add_prompt
method.description: Registers a [JustAMCPPrompt] instance so it appears in [method list_prompts] and can be resolved by [method get_prompt]. Invalid prompt references are ignored.

method.name: complete_prompt
method.description: Looks up the prompt named by [param ref] and returns completion values for [param argument]. Unknown prompts return an empty completion result.

method.name: get_prompt
method.description: Renders the prompt named by [param name] with [param args]. Returns an error dictionary when no registered prompt has that name.

method.name: list_prompts
method.description: Returns an MCP-compatible dictionary containing the schemas for all registered prompts. [param cursor] is accepted for protocol compatibility.
